name: TalkKristaElla
_source: s;Ella;Your Highness!|Lady Ella under service of House Valoria reporting for duty!
s;Krista;House Valoria? Oh, I remember you!|{c:e;Krista;Smile}Good to see you again, Ella. It's been a real long time, huh?|Haven't seen your or House Valoria's daughter since I was a kid.
s;Ella;Indeed.{c:e;Ella;NoSmile} And as much as I'd like to exchange pleasantries,|we have more important matters at hand.|Do you remember Roman? He and I came to lend you aid.
s;Krista;Awesome!|{c:e;Krista;NoSmile}But wouldn't have House Valoria said something about sending their knights?|I don't remember any recent messages from them.
s;Ella;We MAY have come without direct orders, Your Highness.
s;Krista;Hah! No worries. I totally get it.|Feel free to stick with us, Ella.{c:e;Krista;FarWink} Your secret's safe with me.
